title: EnvironmentRunnerAuthorization
description: The persisted authorization of a runner to serve a deployment environment (design §5.5): receiving an environment's runs means receiving its credentials, so a runner may not self-assert into an environment. A runner registering for an environment enters the Pending state and is not dispatchable until an administrator of that environment (§15.1) authorizes it; the authorization may later be revoked. Keyed by (environment, runnerId); governed by the target environment's administrators, exactly like Availability (§7.8). Backends store this document verbatim; it is congruent with the API's EnvironmentRunnerAuthorizationView.

environment.description: The environment the runner asks to serve; authorization routes to this environment's administrators (design §7.7/§15.1).

runnerId.description: The runner the authorization applies to.

status.description: The authorization's lifecycle state. Only an Authorized runner is dispatchable for the environment (§5.5); Pending, Quarantined, and Revoked are all excluded from dispatch. Quarantined temporarily excludes a faulted runner while its in-flight runs drain (reinstated by authorizing again); Revoked permanently removes a compromised runner and fences its in-flight work.

reason.description: An optional note recorded with the most recent decision.

createdBy.description: The actor that created the record (the runner self-registering enters Pending).

principal.description: The trusted machine principal that proved ownership of this runnerId by authenticating its registration (design §16.4): the runner's authorization binds to this verified identity rather than to a self-asserted runnerId. Stamped when a runner self-registers through the authenticated registration endpoint; absent on a row an administrator pre-authorized by runnerId before any runner has registered (that row's trust is the administrator's explicit allow-list). Once present, a registration presenting a different principal for the same runnerId is refused.

createdAt.description: When the record was created (the instant the runner first registered for the environment).

decidedBy.description: The environment administrator that last authorized or revoked the runner, if decided.

decidedAt.description: When the runner was last authorized or revoked, if decided.
